_documentation: Reconciles paper abstracts whose Indico title (the key in paperAbstracts.json) drifts from the transcribed programme title that the Anthology renders, in cases where the programme title is the one to keep (correct British spelling, or a clean version of a garbled Indico title) so it cannot simply be edited to match Indico. Each entry maps the synced <year>::<indico-normalised-title> to the <year>::<programme-normalised-title>; corpus.js and archiveProgrammesEnriched.js copy the abstract onto the programme key so it attaches, and scripts/check-abstract-coverage.mjs treats the synced key as reconciled rather than stranded. Durable across re-syncs because it is keyed by the (stable) Indico title. Where the PROGRAMME title is the wrong one (a transcription typo), fix archiveProgrammes.js instead of adding an alias here. See CLAUDE.md §5 and docs/new-conference.md.
2023::engine or brake the franco german: 2023::engine or brake the franco german couple and the future of the european defence industry
2024::military intervention in foreign p: 2024::military intervention in foreign policy making principal agent analysis of us troop withdrawal from korea 1977 1979
